certificate.caveat: Interim validation. When operated in approved mode. No assurance of the minimum strength of generated SSPs (e.g., keys)
certificate.description: The CiscoSSL FIPS Provider is a firmware library that provides cryptographic services to a vast array of Cisco's networking and collaboration products. The module is comprised of a single object module file called fips.so.
